```{r rec-save-outputs, warning=FALSE}
ggsave("recurrent_disease_heatmap_specificity.pdf",
       plot = rec_spec_heatmap, width = 13, height = 7)
ggsave("recurrent_disease_heatmap_ppv.pdf",
       plot = rec_ppv_heatmap, width = 13, height = 7)
ggsave("recurrent_disease_heatmap_npv.pdf",
       plot = rec_npv_heatmap, width = 13, height = 7)

# Save individual ROC / KM / DCA plots
for (nm in names(rec_roc_plots)) {
  ggsave(paste0("recurrent_disease_roc_", nm, ".pdf"),
         plot = rec_roc_plots[[nm]], width = 8, height = 6)
}
for (nm in names(rec_km_plots)) {
  pdf(paste0("recurrent_disease_km_prognostic_", nm, ".pdf"), width = 10, height = 7)
  print(rec_km_plots[[nm]])
  dev.off()
}
for (nm in names(rec_dca_plots)) {
  ggsave(paste0("recurrent_disease_dca_", nm, ".pdf"),
         plot = rec_dca_plots[[nm]], width = 10, height = 6)
}

cat("All recurrent disease outputs saved.\n")
```

# EAU vs EAU + Prior Event Count (No Time Cutoff)

This section answers a focused question: **does simply adding "number of prior stone events" (with no time-gap requirement) improve prognostic accuracy over EAU stratification alone?**

We sweep the count threshold across ≥2, ≥3, ≥4 prior events. To avoid repeated-measures confounding we run two complementary analyses:

1. **Per-transition analysis** — each transition (1→2, 2→3, 3→4, 4→5) is analysed separately. Within a transition, all participants share the same `from_event_num`, so only thresholds strictly greater than that value provide discrimination (other thresholds are reported as not applicable).
2. **Pooled analysis** — each participant contributes exactly one row (their latest observed transition with ≥5-year follow-up or event), so `from_event_num` varies across the sample and the count threshold is genuinely discriminatory.

## Per-Transition: Sweep Count Thresholds

```{r eau-vs-count-per-transition, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
count_thresholds <- c(2L, 3L, 4L)

pertr_metrics_list <- list()
pertr_roc_plots    <- list()
pertr_delong_rows  <- list()

for (tr in levels(transitions_long$transition)) {

  tl <- transitions_long %>%
    filter(transition == tr) %>%
    mutate(
      risk_eau = if_else(!is.na(eau_risk) & eau_risk == "high_risk",
                         "high_risk", "low_risk")
    )

  # Base (EAU only) ROC for this transition
  rd_eau <- tl %>%
    mutate(
      actual = case_when(
        had_next_event == 1 ~ 1L,
        had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ 0L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      ),
      predicted = if_else(risk_eau == "high_risk", 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    drop_na(actual, predicted)

  if (nrow(rd_eau) < 10 || length(unique(rd_eau$actual)) < 2) next

  ro_eau <- roc(rd_eau$actual, rd_eau$predicted, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_eau <- round(as.numeric(auc(ro_eau)), 3)

  m_eau <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_eau, "\u22651 subsequent stone event", rd_eau) %>%
    mutate(
      Transition      = tr,
      Risk_Definition = "EAU Only",
      Count_Threshold = NA_integer_
    )
  pertr_metrics_list[[paste(tr, "EAU_Only", sep = "_")]] <- m_eau

  roc_overlay_df <- data.frame(
    fpr = 1 - ro_eau$specificities,
    tpr = ro_eau$sensitivities,
    Definition = paste0("EAU Only (AUC=", auc_eau, ")")
  )

  # Sweep count thresholds
  for (ct in count_thresholds) {

    tl2 <- tl %>%
      mutate(
        recurrent_count = from_event_num >= ct,
        risk_combined = if_else(
          !is.na(eau_risk) & (eau_risk == "high_risk" | recurrent_count),
          "high_risk", "low_risk"
        )
      )

    rd_c <- tl2 %>%
      mutate(
        actual = case_when(
          had_next_event == 1 ~ 1L,
          had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ 0L,
          TRUE ~ NA_integer_
        ),
        predicted = if_else(risk_combined == "high_risk", 1, 0)
      ) %>%
      drop_na(actual, predicted)

    # If the count threshold does not discriminate within this transition
    # (i.e. everyone in the transition satisfies or fails it), the combined
    # classifier collapses to EAU-only or to "all high risk" — record but
    # mark as not-applicable-for-discrimination.
    all_count_same <- length(unique(rd_c$predicted)) < 2 &&
                      all((tl2$from_event_num >= ct) == (tl2$from_event_num[1] >= ct))

    if (nrow(rd_c) < 10 || length(unique(rd_c$actual)) < 2) next

    ro_c <- roc(rd_c$actual, rd_c$predicted, quiet = TRUE)
    auc_c <- round(as.numeric(auc(ro_c)), 3)

    m_c <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_c,
                                "\u22651 subsequent stone event",
                                rd_c) %>%
      mutate(
        Transition      = tr,
        Risk_Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events"),
        Count_Threshold = ct
      )
    pertr_metrics_list[[paste(tr, "count", ct, sep = "_")]] <- m_c

    roc_overlay_df <- rbind(
      roc_overlay_df,
      data.frame(
        fpr = 1 - ro_c$specificities,
        tpr = ro_c$sensitivities,
        Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events (AUC=", auc_c, ")")
      )
    )

    # DeLong
    dl <- tryCatch(
      roc.test(ro_eau, ro_c, method = "delong"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    pertr_delong_rows[[paste(tr, ct, sep = "_")]] <- data.frame(
      Transition      = tr,
      Count_Threshold = ct,
      Risk_Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events"),
      delong_p        = if (is.null(dl)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(dl$p.value)
    )
  }

  # ROC overlay plot
  p_roc <- ggplot(roc_overlay_df,
                  aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, colour = Definition)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(
      x = "False Positive Rate",
      y = "True Positive Rate",
      title = paste0("ROC: Transition ", tr,
                     " \u2014 EAU vs EAU + prior event count"),
      colour = "Risk Definition"
    ) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("#7570b3", "#d95f02", "#1b9e77", "#e7298a")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

  safe_tr <- gsub("\u2192", "to", tr)
  pertr_roc_plots[[paste0("transition_", safe_tr)]] <- p_roc
}

pertr_metrics_df <- bind_rows(pertr_metrics_list) %>%
  mutate(
    Transition = factor(Transition,
                        levels = c("1\u21922", "2\u21923", "3\u21924", "4\u21925")),
    Risk_Definition = factor(
      Risk_Definition,
      levels = c("EAU Only",
                 "EAU + \u22652 events",
                 "EAU + \u22653 events",
                 "EAU + \u22654 events")
    )
  )

pertr_delong_df <- bind_rows(pertr_delong_rows) %>%
  mutate(delong_p_fmt = ifelse(is.na(delong_p), NA,
                               ifelse(delong_p < 0.001, "<0.001",
                                      sprintf("%.3f", delong_p))))

cat("Per-transition sweep complete:",
    nrow(pertr_metrics_df), "classifier x transition rows.\n")
```

### ROC Overlays per Transition

```{r eau-vs-count-roc-plots, fig.width=9, fig.height=7, warning=FALSE}
for (nm in names(pertr_roc_plots)) {
  cat("\n#### ", gsub("transition_", "Transition ", nm), "\n")
  print(pertr_roc_plots[[nm]])
  cat("\n")
}
```

### Metrics Table (Per Transition)

```{r eau-vs-count-metrics-table, warning=FALSE}
pertr_metrics_df %>%
  left_join(pertr_delong_df %>%
              dplyr::select(Transition, Risk_Definition, delong_p_fmt),
            by = c("Transition", "Risk_Definition")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Transition, Risk_Definition,
                N, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                AUC, delong_p_fmt,
                Sensitivity, Specificity, PPV, NPV) %>%
  arrange(Transition, Risk_Definition) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Per-Transition: EAU Only vs EAU + Prior Event Count (no time cutoff)",
             subtitle = "DeLong p-value compares each combined classifier to EAU Only within the same transition") %>%
  gt_theme_espn()
```

## Pooled: One Row per Participant (Latest Transition)

To obtain a single pooled AUC comparison, we take each participant's **latest** available transition — i.e. the highest `from_event_num` for which they have either an observed next event or ≥ `follow_up_years` of follow-up. This preserves independence (one row per participant) while letting `from_event_num` vary.

```{r eau-vs-count-pooled-build, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
pooled_df <- transitions_long %>%
  mutate(
    usable = case_when(
      had_next_event == 1 ~ TRUE,
      had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(usable) %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  arrange(desc(from_event_num)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    actual = case_when(
      had_next_event == 1 ~ 1L,
      had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    risk_eau = if_else(!is.na(eau_risk) & eau_risk == "high_risk",
                       "high_risk", "low_risk")
  ) %>%
  drop_na(actual)

cat("Pooled analysis N =", nrow(pooled_df),
    "unique participants\n",
    "  from_event_num distribution:\n")
print(table(pooled_df$from_event_num))
```

```{r eau-vs-count-pooled-metrics, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
pooled_metrics_list <- list()
pooled_roc_list     <- list()
pooled_roc_overlay  <- data.frame()
pooled_delong_rows  <- list()

# EAU Only baseline
rd_eau_p <- pooled_df %>%
  mutate(predicted = if_else(risk_eau == "high_risk", 1, 0)) %>%
  drop_na(actual, predicted)

ro_eau_p <- roc(rd_eau_p$actual, rd_eau_p$predicted, quiet = TRUE)
auc_eau_p <- round(as.numeric(auc(ro_eau_p)), 3)

pooled_roc_list[["EAU Only"]] <- ro_eau_p

pooled_metrics_list[["EAU_Only"]] <-
  extract_metrics_grid(ro_eau_p,
                       "\u22651 subsequent stone event",
                       rd_eau_p) %>%
  mutate(Risk_Definition = "EAU Only",
         Count_Threshold = NA_integer_)

pooled_roc_overlay <- rbind(
  pooled_roc_overlay,
  data.frame(
    fpr = 1 - ro_eau_p$specificities,
    tpr = ro_eau_p$sensitivities,
    Definition = paste0("EAU Only (AUC=", auc_eau_p, ")")
  )
)

# Sweep count thresholds
for (ct in count_thresholds) {

  rd_c_p <- pooled_df %>%
    mutate(
      recurrent_count = from_event_num >= ct,
      risk_combined = if_else(
        !is.na(eau_risk) & (eau_risk == "high_risk" | recurrent_count),
        "high_risk", "low_risk"
      ),
      predicted = if_else(risk_combined == "high_risk", 1, 0)
    ) %>%
    drop_na(actual, predicted)

  if (length(unique(rd_c_p$predicted)) < 2) next

  ro_c_p <- roc(rd_c_p$actual, rd_c_p$predicted, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_c_p <- round(as.numeric(auc(ro_c_p)), 3)

  pooled_roc_list[[paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events")]] <- ro_c_p

  pooled_metrics_list[[paste0("count_", ct)]] <-
    extract_metrics_grid(ro_c_p,
                         "\u22651 subsequent stone event",
                         rd_c_p) %>%
    mutate(Risk_Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events"),
           Count_Threshold = ct)

  pooled_roc_overlay <- rbind(
    pooled_roc_overlay,
    data.frame(
      fpr = 1 - ro_c_p$specificities,
      tpr = ro_c_p$sensitivities,
      Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events (AUC=", auc_c_p, ")")
    )
  )

  dl_p <- tryCatch(
    roc.test(ro_eau_p, ro_c_p, method = "delong"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  pooled_delong_rows[[as.character(ct)]] <- data.frame(
    Count_Threshold = ct,
    Risk_Definition = paste0("EAU + \u2265", ct, " events"),
    delong_p        = if (is.null(dl_p)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(dl_p$p.value)
  )
}

pooled_metrics_df <- bind_rows(pooled_metrics_list) %>%
  mutate(Risk_Definition = factor(
    Risk_Definition,
    levels = c("EAU Only",
               "EAU + \u22652 events",
               "EAU + \u22653 events",
               "EAU + \u22654 events")
  ))

pooled_delong_df <- bind_rows(pooled_delong_rows) %>%
  mutate(delong_p_fmt = ifelse(is.na(delong_p), NA,
                               ifelse(delong_p < 0.001, "<0.001",
                                      sprintf("%.3f", delong_p))))

cat("Pooled sweep complete.\n")
```

### Pooled ROC Overlay

```{r eau-vs-count-pooled-roc, fig.width=9, fig.height=7, warning=FALSE}
pooled_roc_plot <- ggplot(pooled_roc_overlay,
                          aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, colour = Definition)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(
    x = "False Positive Rate",
    y = "True Positive Rate",
    title = "Pooled ROC: EAU vs EAU + Prior Event Count (no time cutoff)",
    subtitle = paste0("N = ", nrow(pooled_df),
                      " (one row per participant, latest observed transition)"),
    colour = "Risk Definition"
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#7570b3", "#d95f02", "#1b9e77", "#e7298a")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

pooled_roc_plot
```

### Pooled Metrics Table

```{r eau-vs-count-pooled-table, warning=FALSE}
pooled_metrics_df %>%
  left_join(pooled_delong_df %>%
              dplyr::select(Risk_Definition, delong_p_fmt),
            by = "Risk_Definition") %>%
  dplyr::select(Risk_Definition,
                N, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                AUC, delong_p_fmt,
                Sensitivity, Specificity, PPV, NPV) %>%
  arrange(Risk_Definition) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Pooled: EAU Only vs EAU + Prior Event Count (no time cutoff)",
             subtitle = "DeLong p-value compares each combined classifier to EAU Only") %>%
  gt_theme_espn()
```

## Save Outputs

```{r eau-vs-count-save, warning=FALSE}
# Per-transition outputs
write.csv(
  pertr_metrics_df %>%
    left_join(pertr_delong_df %>%
                dplyr::select(Transition, Risk_Definition, delong_p),
              by = c("Transition", "Risk_Definition")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Transition, Risk_Definition, Count_Threshold,
                  N, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                  AUC_val, AUC_lo, AUC_hi, delong_p,
                  Sensitivity_val, Sensitivity_lo, Sensitivity_hi,
                  Specificity_val, Specificity_lo, Specificity_hi,
                  PPV_val, PPV_lo, PPV_hi,
                  NPV_val, NPV_lo, NPV_hi),
  "eau_vs_count_no_timecutoff_per_transition.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

for (nm in names(pertr_roc_plots)) {
  ggsave(paste0("eau_vs_count_no_timecutoff_roc_", nm, ".pdf"),
         plot = pertr_roc_plots[[nm]], width = 9, height = 7)
}

# Pooled outputs
write.csv(
  pooled_metrics_df %>%
    left_join(pooled_delong_df %>%
                dplyr::select(Risk_Definition, delong_p),
              by = "Risk_Definition") %>%
    dplyr::select(Risk_Definition, Count_Threshold,
                  N, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                  AUC_val, AUC_lo, AUC_hi, delong_p,
                  Sensitivity_val, Sensitivity_lo, Sensitivity_hi,
                  Specificity_val, Specificity_lo, Specificity_hi,
                  PPV_val, PPV_lo, PPV_hi,
                  NPV_val, NPV_lo, NPV_hi),
  "eau_vs_count_no_timecutoff_pooled.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

ggsave("eau_vs_count_no_timecutoff_pooled_roc.pdf",
       plot = pooled_roc_plot, width = 9, height = 7)

cat("EAU vs count-threshold (no time cutoff) outputs saved.\n")
```

# Does Restricting Inter-Event Time Attenuate the Recurrent-Disease Effect?

Framed as prognostic accuracy: does requiring a short prior inter-event gap change the AUC of the "prior recurrence" classifier? If the any-recurrence signal is genuinely driven by short-gap recurrers, then:

1. Restricting positives to **recent** recurrence (≥2 events AND short gap) should yield a similar or higher AUC than any recurrence.
2. Restricting positives to **distant** recurrence (≥2 events AND long gap) should collapse AUC toward 0.5.
3. Within a subsample of *first-event + distant-recurrence* only, `from_event_num ≥ 2` should no longer discriminate (its AUC 95% CI should cross 0.5).

DeLong's test is used throughout on the pooled, one-row-per-participant sample.

## Build the Pooled Sample (if not already present)

```{r attenuate-pooled-build, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Re-derive pooled_df to be self-contained (no-op if identical to earlier chunk)
pooled_df <- transitions_long %>%
  mutate(usable = case_when(
    had_next_event == 1 ~ TRUE,
    had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE)) %>%
  filter(usable) %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  arrange(desc(from_event_num)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(actual = case_when(
    had_next_event == 1 ~ 1L,
    had_next_event == 0 & time_to_next_years >= follow_up_years ~ 0L,
    TRUE ~ NA_integer_)) %>%
  drop_na(actual)

cat("Pooled N =", nrow(pooled_df), "\n")
```

## Three Classifiers + DeLong at Each Gap Cutoff

```{r attenuate-delong-sweep, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
gap_cutoffs <- c(12, 18, 24)

attenuate_metrics_list <- list()
attenuate_delong_list  <- list()
attenuate_roc_plots    <- list()

for (cutoff in gap_cutoffs) {

  df_c <- pooled_df %>%
    mutate(
      any_rec    = as.integer(from_event_num >= 2),
      recent_rec = as.integer(from_event_num >= 2 &
                              !is.na(prior_gap_months) &
                              prior_gap_months <= cutoff),
      distant_rec = as.integer(from_event_num >= 2 &
                               (is.na(prior_gap_months) |
                                prior_gap_months > cutoff))
    )

  ro_any     <- roc(df_c$actual, df_c$any_rec,     quiet = TRUE)
  ro_recent  <- roc(df_c$actual, df_c$recent_rec,  quiet = TRUE)
  ro_distant <- roc(df_c$actual, df_c$distant_rec, quiet = TRUE)

  # Helper: AUC + 95% CI
  auc_ci <- function(ro) {
    ci <- ci.auc(ro)
    c(auc = as.numeric(auc(ro)),
      lo  = as.numeric(ci[1]),
      hi  = as.numeric(ci[3]))
  }

  s_any     <- auc_ci(ro_any)
  s_recent  <- auc_ci(ro_recent)
  s_distant <- auc_ci(ro_distant)

  rd_any     <- df_c %>% dplyr::rename(predicted = any_rec)
  rd_recent  <- df_c %>% dplyr::rename(predicted = recent_rec)
  rd_distant <- df_c %>% dplyr::rename(predicted = distant_rec)

  m_any <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_any,
    "\u22651 subsequent stone event", rd_any) %>%
    mutate(Gap_Cutoff_Months = cutoff,
           Classifier = "Any recurrence (\u22652 events)")
  m_recent <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_recent,
    "\u22651 subsequent stone event", rd_recent) %>%
    mutate(Gap_Cutoff_Months = cutoff,
           Classifier = paste0("Recent recurrence (gap \u2264", cutoff, "mo)"))
  m_distant <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_distant,
    "\u22651 subsequent stone event", rd_distant) %>%
    mutate(Gap_Cutoff_Months = cutoff,
           Classifier = paste0("Distant recurrence (gap >", cutoff, "mo)"))

  attenuate_metrics_list[[paste0("cut_", cutoff)]] <-
    bind_rows(m_any, m_recent, m_distant)

  # DeLong tests
  dl_any_vs_recent  <- tryCatch(roc.test(ro_any, ro_recent,  method = "delong"),
                                error = function(e) NULL)
  dl_any_vs_distant <- tryCatch(roc.test(ro_any, ro_distant, method = "delong"),
                                error = function(e) NULL)
  dl_recent_vs_dist <- tryCatch(roc.test(ro_recent, ro_distant, method = "delong"),
                                error = function(e) NULL)

  attenuate_delong_list[[paste0("cut_", cutoff)]] <- data.frame(
    Gap_Cutoff_Months = cutoff,
    Comparison = c("Any vs Recent", "Any vs Distant", "Recent vs Distant"),
    delong_p = c(
      if (is.null(dl_any_vs_recent))  NA_real_ else as.numeric(dl_any_vs_recent$p.value),
      if (is.null(dl_any_vs_distant)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(dl_any_vs_distant$p.value),
      if (is.null(dl_recent_vs_dist)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(dl_recent_vs_dist$p.value)
    )
  )

  cat(sprintf(
    "\n--- Gap cutoff: %dmo ---\n  Any    AUC = %.3f (%.3f, %.3f)\n  Recent AUC = %.3f (%.3f, %.3f)\n  Distant AUC = %.3f (%.3f, %.3f)\n  DeLong Any vs Recent:  p = %s\n  DeLong Any vs Distant: p = %s\n  DeLong Recent vs Distant: p = %s\n",
    cutoff,
    s_any["auc"], s_any["lo"], s_any["hi"],
    s_recent["auc"], s_recent["lo"], s_recent["hi"],
    s_distant["auc"], s_distant["lo"], s_distant["hi"],
    ifelse(is.null(dl_any_vs_recent),  "NA", format.pval(dl_any_vs_recent$p.value,  digits = 3)),
    ifelse(is.null(dl_any_vs_distant), "NA", format.pval(dl_any_vs_distant$p.value, digits = 3)),
    ifelse(is.null(dl_recent_vs_dist), "NA", format.pval(dl_recent_vs_dist$p.value, digits = 3))
  ))

  # ROC overlay plot
  auc_any_r     <- round(s_any["auc"],     3)
  auc_recent_r  <- round(s_recent["auc"],  3)
  auc_distant_r <- round(s_distant["auc"], 3)

  roc_ov <- rbind(
    data.frame(fpr = 1 - ro_any$specificities,
               tpr = ro_any$sensitivities,
               Classifier = paste0("Any recurrence (AUC=", auc_any_r, ")")),
    data.frame(fpr = 1 - ro_recent$specificities,
               tpr = ro_recent$sensitivities,
               Classifier = paste0("Recent recurrence \u2264",
                                   cutoff, "mo (AUC=", auc_recent_r, ")")),
    data.frame(fpr = 1 - ro_distant$specificities,
               tpr = ro_distant$sensitivities,
               Classifier = paste0("Distant recurrence >",
                                   cutoff, "mo (AUC=", auc_distant_r, ")"))
  )

  p_roc <- ggplot(roc_ov, aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, colour = Classifier)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(x = "False Positive Rate", y = "True Positive Rate",
         title = paste0("Does the time restriction attenuate the effect? ",
                        "Gap cutoff ", cutoff, "mo"),
         subtitle = paste0("Pooled N = ", nrow(pooled_df),
                           " (one row per participant, latest transition)"),
         colour = "Classifier") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02", "#7570b3")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 3))

  attenuate_roc_plots[[paste0("cut_", cutoff)]] <- p_roc
}

attenuate_metrics_df <- bind_rows(attenuate_metrics_list)
attenuate_delong_df  <- bind_rows(attenuate_delong_list) %>%
  mutate(delong_p_fmt = ifelse(is.na(delong_p), NA,
                               ifelse(delong_p < 0.001, "<0.001",
                                      sprintf("%.3f", delong_p))))
```

### ROC Overlays

```{r attenuate-roc-plots, fig.width=9, fig.height=7, warning=FALSE}
for (nm in names(attenuate_roc_plots)) print(attenuate_roc_plots[[nm]])
```

### AUC + CI Table

```{r attenuate-auc-table, warning=FALSE}
attenuate_metrics_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Gap_Cutoff_Months, Classifier,
                N, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                AUC, Sensitivity, Specificity, PPV, NPV) %>%
  arrange(Gap_Cutoff_Months, Classifier) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Time-restriction attenuation test: AUC + metrics per classifier",
             subtitle = "Pooled (one row per participant, latest transition)") %>%
  gt_theme_espn()
```

### DeLong Comparisons

```{r attenuate-delong-table, warning=FALSE}
attenuate_delong_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Gap_Cutoff_Months, Comparison, delong_p_fmt) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "DeLong comparisons across classifiers",
             subtitle = "Tests whether the time restriction changes AUC vs any-recurrence") %>%
  gt_theme_espn()
```

## Subgroup Test: Is `from_event_num ≥ 2` Still Informative Among Long-Gap Recurrers?

Within a subsample consisting of **first-event cases + distant-recurrence cases only**, we test whether the event-count classifier retains predictive value. If the confidence interval for AUC crosses 0.5, the "attenuates" wording is supported.

```{r attenuate-subgroup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
attenuate_subgroup_list <- list()

for (cutoff in gap_cutoffs) {

  sub_df <- pooled_df %>%
    filter(
      from_event_num == 1 |
      (from_event_num >= 2 & (is.na(prior_gap_months) | prior_gap_months > cutoff))
    ) %>%
    mutate(predicted = as.integer(from_event_num >= 2))

  if (length(unique(sub_df$predicted)) < 2 ||
      length(unique(sub_df$actual))    < 2) next

  ro_sub <- roc(sub_df$actual, sub_df$predicted, quiet = TRUE)
  ci_sub <- ci.auc(ro_sub)

  # Bootstrap p-value for AUC vs 0.5
  n_boot <- 1000
  set.seed(42)
  boot_aucs <- replicate(n_boot, {
    idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(sub_df)), replace = TRUE)
    boot_df <- sub_df[idx, ]
    if (length(unique(boot_df$actual)) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    as.numeric(auc(roc(boot_df$actual, boot_df$predicted, quiet = TRUE)))
  })
  boot_aucs <- boot_aucs[!is.na(boot_aucs)]
  # Two-sided empirical p-value vs null of 0.5
  p_vs_half <- 2 * min(mean(boot_aucs <= 0.5), mean(boot_aucs >= 0.5))

  m_sub <- extract_metrics_grid(ro_sub,
    "\u22651 subsequent stone event", sub_df) %>%
    mutate(Gap_Cutoff_Months = cutoff,
           N_total = nrow(sub_df),
           boot_p_vs_0.5 = p_vs_half)

  attenuate_subgroup_list[[paste0("cut_", cutoff)]] <- m_sub

  cat(sprintf(
    "\nSubgroup (first-event + distant recurrence), gap > %dmo\n  N = %d   AUC = %.3f (%.3f, %.3f)   boot p vs 0.5 = %.3f\n",
    cutoff, nrow(sub_df),
    as.numeric(auc(ro_sub)), ci_sub[1], ci_sub[3], p_vs_half
  ))
}

attenuate_subgroup_df <- bind_rows(attenuate_subgroup_list)

attenuate_subgroup_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Gap_Cutoff_Months, N_total, N_High_Risk, N_Low_Risk,
                AUC, boot_p_vs_0.5, Sensitivity, Specificity, PPV, NPV) %>%
  mutate(boot_p_vs_0.5 = ifelse(boot_p_vs_0.5 < 0.001, "<0.001",
                                sprintf("%.3f", boot_p_vs_0.5))) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Subgroup: event-count classifier restricted to long-gap recurrers + first-event cases",
             subtitle = "AUC CI crossing 0.5 OR bootstrap p > 0.05 supports 'attenuates' wording") %>%
  gt_theme_espn()
```

## Save Attenuation-Test Outputs

```{r attenuate-save, warning=FALSE}
write.csv(attenuate_metrics_df,
          "attenuation_test_auc_metrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(attenuate_delong_df,
          "attenuation_test_delong.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(attenuate_subgroup_df,
          "attenuation_test_subgroup.csv", row.names = FALSE)

for (nm in names(attenuate_roc_plots)) {
  ggsave(paste0("attenuation_test_roc_", nm, ".pdf"),
         plot = attenuate_roc_plots[[nm]], width = 9, height = 7)
}

cat("attenuation-test outputs saved.\n")
```
